# GitHub Documentation

This directory contains GitHub-specific documentation and configuration for the nuts-node repository.

## For AI Agents

Claude Code skill files (custom slash commands) for common maintenance tasks are in [`.claude/commands/`](../.claude/commands/).

## For Contributors

- **[CODEOWNERS](CODEOWNERS)** - Defines code ownership for automatic review assignment
- **[dependabot.yml](dependabot.yml)** - Configuration for automated dependency updates
- **[workflows/](workflows/)** - GitHub Actions workflow definitions

## Related Documentation

- [Main README](../README.rst) - Project overview and getting started
- [Documentation](../docs/) - Full project documentation
- [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md) - Security vulnerability reporting
